title: MIDAS RateInfo
description: Rate information and associated time-series values for a single RIN.

RateID.description: The Rate Identification Number (RIN). Null when querying realtime on a non-realtime RIN.

SystemTime_UTC.description: Server timestamp of the response in UTC.

RateName.description: Name of the rate as provided by the uploading party.

RateType.description: Rate classification (TOU, CPP, RTP, etc.). Null for some signal types (e.g. Flex Alert).

API_Url.description: API URL as provided by uploading party, or null.

RatePlan_Url.description: Link to rate schedule as provided by uploading party, or null.

AltRateName2.description: Another alternate rate name, or null.

SignupCloseDate.description: Last day to sign up for the rate, or null. Live API returns full ISO 8601 datetime despite upstream docs describing it as a date.

ValueInformation.description: Time-series collection of price/value intervals. Null when no data is available (e.g. realtime query on a non-realtime RIN).
